articles.title: Gaza City hospitals say several killed in strike, as Israel targets Hamas leaders
articles.summary: At least five children were reportedly killed in the strike, which appears to have targeted a Hamas commander.

articles.title: Are US and Iran close to peace or sliding back to war?

articles.summary: Several parents were still waiting for news of their children roughly 12 hours after the fire.
